name: Jumpcloud Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active jumpcloud accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name FROM jumpcloud_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.activated, true) = true AND COALESCE(u.suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
